title: StormTech
description: StormTech this is of one the first modpack to feature ProtoManly’s Weather Mod and our own mod (coming soon). And lots of other mods
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2a11a0d31d6ba9e7dc5b874b1f5f207ec4057cf.png)
# 🌩️ Welcome to StormTech

StormTech is one of the first modpacks to feature ProtoManly’s Weather Mod—a groundbreaking addition that brings extreme weather events like storms and tornadoes to Minecraft. It also includes an upcoming custom mod by the pack creator, expanding gameplay possibilities even further.

This pack blends technical automation, weather realism, and seasonal survival into a performance-optimized experience perfect for both seasoned modded players and newcomers looking for something fresh.

⸻

## 🔧 What Does StormTech Add?

StormTech introduces a well-balanced mix of survival, tech, and world-generation mods. Key features include:
	
•	🌪️ Dynamic Weather — ProtoManly’s Weather Mod adds immersive atmospheric storms, wind, and tornadoes.
    
•	⚙️ Technical Progression — Create complex machines and automate your world with Create, Mekanism, and Applied Energistics 2.
    
•	🍂 Seasons & Survival — Serene Seasons, Sophisticated Backpacks, and other survival mods deepen gameplay.
    
•	🌍 World Generation Overhaul — better structures with YUNG’s mods.
    
•	💻 Quality-of-Life Client Tools — AppleSkin, Jade, BetterF3, and more improve your user experience.
    
•	🚀 Performance-Boosted — Featuring Sodium, ModernFix, and Clumps for smoother gameplay on a wide range of systems.

⸻

## 🌟 Why Download StormTech?

•	✅ Be Among the First — Play with ProtoManly’s Weather Mod in a curated, optimized modpack.
    
•	⚙️ Perfect for Tech Lovers & Explorers — Balance between automation, survival, and visual immersion.
    
•	🖥️ Runs on Modern PCs — Performance mods are included to keep gameplay smooth, even on less powerful machines.
    
•	🧊 Immersive Gameplay — From storms and seasons to detailed structures and storage solutions, it’s a fresh take on modded Minecraft.

⸻

## ⚙️ System Requirements

Minimum GPU: NVIDIA GTX 1660 SUPER / AMD RX 590
Recommended GPU: NVIDIA RTX 3060 / AMD RX 6600 XT

Performance settings and visual downgrade options included for lower-end machines.

⸻

## 🌀 Final Notes

Whether you’re surviving dangerous weather, automating complex systems, or exploring vast overhauled worlds, StormTech delivers an immersive, future-ready modded Minecraft experience.

Stay tuned for updates, including the upcoming exclusive mod by the creator!

⸻
